evidence.description: Full unit test suite at the signed head. Allowlisted in .agent-receipts/policy.yml; the gate executes it without a shell in a contained verification worktree.
The delivered INSTALL-FOR-AGENTS.md, content-addressed at the signed head.

evidence.claim: This receipt is valid for the head it binds. Per the demo script (docs/DEMO.md), the branch will be rewritten and force-pushed AFTER signing, so the gate is expected to refuse it as STALE — that refusal is the exhibit.

judgment_calls: The receipt is emitted honestly for work head 92a5392; the planned force-push that invalidates it is the point of this exhibit.

request.preview: Add the v0.2 git-install path to INSTALL-FOR-AGENTS.md, then rewrite history after signing so the gate demonstrates the STALE refusal.
request.source: tasks/pr-8.md, committed to the base branch by the issuer
